The GRC Companion
Index Install GitHub

Public knowledge layer

The GRC Companion

The GRC Companion is a learning-only companion that teaches GRC engineering through your real work.

Learn from real work

Use the cards to name a pattern, then bring your notes, diffs, transcripts, and artefacts into the Companion.

Cited to a corpus

Each card links back to source material and to more reading on grcengineer.com.

Runs in your AI workspace

The Companion lives in Claude Code, Cursor, Claude Projects, or Codex. The public site stays static.

Browse cards

31 public cards

{{card_count}} cards

{{card_stub_html}}

Install

Pick where you want the Companion to live

Install it once. Then use these cards with your own work in the workspace you already use.

Open install guide ->
Install / View the repo

Cards are the funnel. Install is the CTA.
